subject: A robed mage standing on a misty rocky ridge, arms raised, channeling ribbons of blue magical energy outward toward an unseen target
description: A lone hooded figure in pale blue robes stands atop a jagged, mist-shrouded rocky outcrop with arms outstretched. Glowing cyan ribbons of magic stream from the figure's hands and curl through the air like luminous threads, suggesting a binding or mind-control spell being cast on a target beyond the frame. The background is a cold, foggy landscape of dark stone spires fading into pale mist; the palette is almost entirely cool blues, greys, and ghostly whites, with the magical energy providing the brightest highlights. The mood is quiet, ominous, and focused — a moment of disciplined sorcery rather than violent action.
foreground: robed mage on rocky outcrop with streaming blue magical ribbons
background: misty jagged stone ridges fading into cold fog
